top_signals.title: Trump Threatens More Iran Strikes, SpaceX IPO Demand Takes Off | The Pulse 6/11/2026
top_signals.summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Stefan Hartung, Bosch CEO; Grace Peters, JPMorgan Private Bank Global Investment Strategy Co-Head; Joana Rocha Scaff, Neuberger Berman Head of Europe Private Equity; Tim Rocktäschel, Recursive Co-Founder (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Audiera’s AI token BEAT beats Bitcoin, Ethereum as price surges 1,500% in a month
top_signals.summary: BEAT has reached its most overbought readings on record, raising the odds of a 35% price decline in the coming days.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Japan crypto bill advances with ETF, tax reform path: Report
top_signals.summary: Japan’s Lower House reportedly passed a bill that would bring crypto under the country’s financial instruments framework, potentially opening the door to ETFs and lower tax treatment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Hungary to reverse crypto trading crackdown after EU scrutiny
top_signals.summary: Hungary’s government said it will unwind crypto trading restrictions that required approved validation for conversions and exposed users and service providers to criminal liability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Integreon Names Krishna Nacha CEO
top_signals.summary: Seasoned B2B Transformation Executive to Lead Integreon's AI-Driven Growth and Strategic Expansion
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Digital Asset lands $355M as a16z doubles down on Wall Street blockchain rails
top_signals.summary: Digital Asset raised $355M in an a16z‑led round at a $2B valuation, extending a Wall Street‑backed funding run as banks ramp up pilots on its Canton Network blockchain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
